V] रेणुका कुमार, संयु2 सिचव MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 26th March, 2014 S.O. 902(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (3) of Section 1 of the Companies Act, 2013 (18 of 2013), the Central Government hereby appoints the 1st day of April, 2014 as the date on which the following provisions of the said Act shall come into force, namely:— Sl.
